title: OperatingSystemDigest
description: Schema for OperatingSystemDigest in Nuix REST API

name.description: The name of the operating system.

version.description: The version of the operating system.

arch.description: The arch of the operating system.

description.description: The description of the operating system.

family.description: The family of the operating system.

patchLevel.description: The patch level of the operating system.

vendorName.description: The vendor name of the operating system.

vendorCodeName.description: The vendorCodeName of the operating system.
